_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Strategic ownership involves thinking holistically, and creating and owning an end to end plan to achieve set objectives.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in negotiating strategic vendor partnerships for data and AI platforms, including commercial terms, roadmap alignment, dependency management, and exit strategy planning.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-A-005 (LS, cosine: 0.449), LS-A-003 (LS, cosine: 0.442).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.5/10 (raw 0.245). Shared vocabulary: [strategic]. DDaT-only terms [achieve, creating, end, holistically, involves, objectives] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, alignment, commercial, data, dependency, exit] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.864 (P=0.861, R=0.867). Balanced P/R — the 18-word DDaT element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (97.8%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Strategic ownership involves thinking holistically, and creating and owning an e" and "Skill in negotiating strategic vendor partnerships for data and AI platforms, in". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.487 > STS 0.245 (gap +0.242). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [strategic] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.9%. Shared tokens: [strategic]. DDaT-only: [achieve, creating, end, holistically, involves, objectives]. WIDAI-only: [ai, alignment, commercial, data, dependency, exit].
